description: Known skill conflict pairs — skills that are frequently confused by the dispatcher. Used by the description optimizer to generate targeted negative eval queries.

pairs.distinguisher: evolve audits accumulated learnings and promotes rules; self-evolve iteratively improves a specific skill's body through adversarial co-evolution
critic reviews code in the current working context (single-pass); pr-review uses multiple expert personas for PR-level review
autoloop optimizes any file against a measurable target metric; self-evolve specifically improves skill files through adversarial eval case co-evolution
autoreason improves subjective text through adversarial debate; autoresearch verifies hypotheses through code iteration with measurable outcomes
deepresearch gathers information from multiple sources with citations; autoresearch runs code experiments to verify hypotheses
scout explores the local codebase structure; deepresearch investigates external topics across multiple sources
checkpoint saves progress for resumption in a new session of the same project; handoff captures findings from completed remote sessions into persistent memory
incident-runbook provides structured first-response for unexpected crashes; systematic-debugging does deep 4-phase root-cause analysis when you have enough context
